message:
Fix TS2307: remove deep import of SocketModeReceiver

The import path @slack/bolt/dist/receivers/SocketModeReceiver is not
resolvable in the Docker build environment. Since we're accessing a
private property via any anyway, the type import adds no safety.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
